compatibility.notes: Built from the locked dev commit and not yet verified against the deleted official v1.2.2 binary.

notes: Adds patch metadata, persistent custom base names, a read-only base storage browser with localized container names and bundled item icons, save-source-scoped player notes and tags, a read-only guild detail browser, a read-only base worker browser, and a read-only base feed-box summary, without modifying Palworld save files.
